rationale: For a farm management and livestock dashboard, users need a grounded, reliable, and highly legible interface. The Earthy archetype provides a sense of trust and natural connection without feeling like a generic corporate SaaS. The light theme ensures excellent readability in bright outdoor environments (e.g., fields, barns).

rules: DO NOT use Inter, Roboto, or Open Sans.
Headings must use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Overlines/Labels must be uppercase with wide spacing.
Never center align dense data; stick to left-alignment for standard text and right-alignment for numbers in tables.
Use Mode B: The 'Control Room' Grid for the dashboard.
Containers with borders MUST have internal padding (p-6 or p-8) to prevent text collision.
Images must not exceed 80vh on mobile.

surface_strategies.cards: Neumorphism (Tactile Variant): Flat background (#FFFFFF), 1px subtle border (#E5E3DB), no shadow by default. On hover: Slight lift (-translate-y-1) and shadow-lg.
surface_strategies.sidebar: Flat Solid surface. Dark background (#1B2620) with high contrast text.
surface_strategies.headers: Flat Solid surface with a hard bottom border. Avoid glassmorphism for health/farm apps to maintain data clarity.

buttons.primary: bg-[#4A6741] text-white hover:bg-[#3B5334] rounded-lg px-5 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all active:scale-95
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#3A453F] border border-[#E5E3DB] hover:bg-[#F4F3F0] rounded-lg px-5 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all
buttons.destructive: bg-[#C25934] text-white hover:bg-[#A64B2B] rounded-lg px-5 py-2.5 font-medium transition-all

components.inputs: bg-[#FFFFFF] border border-[#E5E3DB] text-[#1B2620] rounded-lg px-4 py-2 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#4A6741]/20 focus:border-[#4A6741] transition-all
components.tables: w-full text-left text-sm text-[#3A453F] border-collapse. Use clear borders (border-b border-[#E5E3DB]) for each row. Highlight numeric columns with right alignment.

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must have explicit hover states (background color change + slight shadow increase).
motion_and_interactions.transitions: Use specific properties: transition: transform 0.2s ease, background-color 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease.
motion_and_interactions.focus: Focus states must use ring-2 ring-[#4A6741]/50 for accessibility.

icons_and_assets.usage: Use Phosphor Icons for dense dashboard metrics (e.g., Cow, Pig, ChartLineUp, CurrencyDollar, FilePdf).

image_urls.description: Brown and white cow on field - use as a subtle background or banner for the dashboard welcome section.
Green tractor - use as a placeholder or hero image in the expenses or machinery management empty state.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets minimum 4.5:1 contrast ratio against backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute in kebab-case (e.g., data-testid='export-pdf-button').

instructions_to_main_agent: Set up the layout with a Sidebar Navigation containing: Dashboard, Animais, Movimentações, Despesas, Relatórios.
Implement the main Dashboard page with a Bento/Control Room grid. Top row: Key Metrics (Total Animais, Lucro, Despesas). Middle row: Charts using Recharts (Lucro vs Despesas ao longo do ano).
Build an 'Animais' CRUD page to list and add livestock. Fields should include Tipo (Bovino, Suíno, Ovino), Tag/Identificação, Data de Nascimento, Peso Atual.
Build a 'Movimentações e Eventos' section to record Compra, Venda, Morte, Nascimento, Desmame, Vacinação.
Build a 'Despesas' tracker with custom categories (Alimentação, Veterinário, Manutenção, etc).
Include mockup 'Exportar PDF' and 'Exportar Excel' buttons in the Relatórios or Dashboard views using Phosphor Icons.
Ensure the UI uses the #4A6741 primary color and strictly follows the typography rules (Work Sans for headings, IBM Plex Sans for body).
Inject the Google Fonts for Work Sans and IBM Plex Sans in the main index.html file.
